subcodes.first_line: ...O handmaiden of God! Verily, God has confirmed thee in spreading the fragrances of God in those climes.  Be a pillar of fire and a cloud of light and a blessed tree in the vineyard of God, the Precious, the Forgiving
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Mary Magdalene, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God
